title: Icon Journey
body:
- Requirements: [JourneyMap](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) - Any of the mods from the lists below. You do not need all of the mods for this pack to work. - This pack aims to add icons for mobs from a variety of mods.  - This resource pack I will try to update according to the mods that I use the most. If you want to update any mod, please leave it in the comment section. Hope everyone can support me through donation.
Support mod - [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau) - [Ars Elemental](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-elemental) - [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs) - [Born in Chaos](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/born-in-chaos) - [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) - [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) - [Crabber's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/crabbers-delight) - [Enderman Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul) - [Epic Samurai's - Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/epic-samurais) - [Forbidden and Arcanus](https://modrinth.com/mod/forbidden-arcanus/versions) - [Feywild](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/feywild) - [Good Ending](https://modrinth.com/mod/good-ending) - [Hybrid Aquatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/hybrid-aquatic) - [Hamsters](https://modrinth.com/mod/hamsters) - [Infernal Expansion](https://modrinth.com/mod/infernal-expansion) - [Minecraft](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us) - [MCA-reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-comes-alive-reborn) - [Productive Bees](https://modrinth.com/mod/productivebees) - [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark) - [Rats](https://modrinth.com/mod/rats) - [Realmrpg Imps And Demons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/realm-rpg-imps-demons) - [Realmrpg Pots And Mimics](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/pots-and-mimics-rpg) - [Realmrpg Creep And Crop](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/realm-rpg-creep-crop) - [Realmrpg Dragon Wyrms](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/realm-rpg-dragon-wyrms) - [Realmrpg Sea Dwellers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/nocubes-sea-dwellers) - [Snuffles](https://modrinth.com/mod/snuffles) - [Snuffles (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/snuffles-fabric) - [The Outer End](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-outer-end) - [TerraFirmaCraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafirmacraft) - [Vampirism](https://modrinth.com/mod/vampirism) - [Wesley's Roguelike Dungeons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wrd) - [YDM's Red Panda](https://modrinth.com/mod/ydms-red-panda)
